meta.scope: Repo-wide DELFIN baseline inherited by all providers

common_failures: reading large DELFIN modules without grep-first narrowing

rules: German for user-facing conversation, exact, with numbers (Å, eV, s)
file:line + change, one sentence — no prose
No confirmation questions on clear tasks
After every 3rd tool call in a sequence, emit a one-line progress status
Flag risk proactively before editing SLURM/runtime/scheduler files
Git workflow: commit and push directly to main, no feature branches, no PRs
Grep before Read — never >200 lines at once
Read(offset, limit) after Grep, never whole file
Independent tool calls always in parallel
Run pytest plus syntax check after every Python edit
For chemistry questions: search_docs before answering
tool_usage.environment_detection: python -c 'import delfin' first, then local repo tests before broader probing

weaknesses: Large DELFIN monoliths require grep-first narrowing
Scheduler/runtime edits need explicit risk framing

anti_patterns: Sequential tool calls on independent tasks
Generic ORCA/xTB answers instead of search_docs
Multi-paragraph explanations instead of one-liner diffs

build_up_complex.notes: VdW fix, Procrustes init, xTB reranking validated. Strength.

config_validation.notes: CONTROL parsing, mutable dicts — proceed carefully

test_writing.notes: Mocks for ORCA/xTB, never run real computations

git_workflow.notes: Commit and push directly to main. No branches, no PRs.

coding.notes: General DELFIN code changes default here unless a narrower class overrides it.

chemistry.notes: Method-sensitive chemistry tasks need docs-first and more caution.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard tasks succeed often but still need concise UI-safe diffs.

common_failures: dashboard edits drifting into longer prose than the UI needs

error_patterns.error: Profile schema mismatch — engine.py couldn't read task_performance data
error_patterns.root_cause: Nested profile keys didn't match _DEFAULT_PROFILE flat structure
error_patterns.prevents: Adaptive routing and thinking budget silently falling back to defaults

error_patterns.error: format_profile_context() never called — profile data invisible to agents
error_patterns.fix: Added _load_profile_context() call for solo and pipeline modes
error_patterns.prevents: Agents ignoring learned success rates and failure patterns

error_patterns.error: File referenced as build_up_complex2.py but actual name is build_up_complex.py
error_patterns.root_cause: Memory from earlier session used wrong filename
error_patterns.fix: Verified with Glob, corrected in profile and playbooks
error_patterns.prevents: Grep/Read failing silently on wrong filename

rules: No Co-Authored-By in commits
Dashboard actions: ACTION line + max 5 words explanation
pytest in background after every code change
Agent subprocesses for research spanning >3 files
tool_usage.environment_detection: python -c 'import delfin' first, then micromamba only as fallback

strengths: build_up_complex.py: PSO fitness, VdW radii, Procrustes init
Coordination chemistry: geometries, bond lengths, clash detection
weaknesses: Tendency toward generic answers on QM parameters — use search_docs immediately
Context waste from unnecessarily large Reads
Too much confirmation instead of action

build_up_complex.description: Editing the metal complex builder (PSO swarm, ligand placement)
steps: 1. Grep for the target function name in build_up_complex.py
4. Edit, then run: pytest tests/ -x -q -k 'not browser' in background
5. If touching VdW/clash logic: verify radii are VdW (not covalent), threshold 75% of sum
key_invariants: PSO places ligands as rigid bodies (6 DOF) — never modify intra-ligand topology
VdW radii for clash detection, NOT covalent radii
Procrustes init for bidentate+ ligands (>=2 donors → SVD alignment)

steps: 1. Grep config.py for the relevant key/function
key_invariants: Config dicts are mutable — changes propagate. Be careful with shared state
OCCUPIER_parser is separate from main CONTROL parser

steps: 1. Grep cli.py for the subcommand name
key_invariants: CLI uses lazy loading — heavy imports are deferred

orca_recovery.description: Modifying error detection or retry logic
steps: 1. OrcaErrorType enum (line 28) defines all known error types
2. OrcaErrorDetector (line 62) matches output patterns to error types
3. RecoveryStrategy (line 275) maps errors to fix actions
4. OrcaInputModifier (line 684) applies the actual input file changes
key_invariants: Recovery must work for both local and SLURM backends
Never modify the original input — create a new input for retry

steps: 1. This is the largest module (18073 lines) — always Grep first
key_invariants: Multiple fallback strategies: RDKit → OpenBabel → manual embed
Metal bonds converted to dative bonds via _convert_metal_bonds_to_dative
Hapto approximation is optional — check _hapto_approx_enabled flag

dashboard_agent.description: AI agent tab in the dashboard
steps: 1. tab_agent.py is 7435 lines — always Grep first
3. Grep for specific widget or callback names

codebase_map.description: Key files with sizes and important entry points. Verify line numbers before using — code evolves.

smiles_converter.py.warning: Largest module — ALWAYS Grep, never Read whole file

learnings: Profile schema must match _DEFAULT_PROFILE for engine.py to consume it
Playbooks and codebase_map need prompt injection to be useful
format_profile_context() exists but is never called in build_system_prompt()
Solo mode outcome tracking was missing
correction_details: Profile should self-update after every session
Optimize all modes, not just dashboard

optimization_history.change: v1.0: Initial profile from 9 feedback memories
optimization_history.impact: Future sessions start with full context

optimization_history.change: v1.0 → v2.0: Added playbooks, codebase_map, session_log
v2.0 → v2.1: Aligned schema with provider_profile.py _DEFAULT_PROFILE. Added top-level success_rate (per mode), thinking_budget_mult, common_failures. Sharpened communication rules.
optimization_history.impact: Engine can now read profile data for adaptive routing and thinking budget

optimization_history.change: v2.1 → v2.2: Added verification checklist, solo auto-retry, git context at session start, code templates in playbooks, proactive domain recommendations, structured error_patterns with root cause and fix
optimization_history.impact: Closes gap with CLI tools: systematic verification, self-healing test failures, domain expertise surfaced proactively

optimization_history.change: v2.2 → v3.0: Moved repo-wide DELFIN rules into shared baseline and kept only claude-specific overlays here
optimization_history.impact: Separates global DELFIN guidance from provider-specific behavior

common_failures: treating cluster or scheduler changes like low-risk local edits
answering ORCA/xTB/method questions without doc-first lookup
reading DELFIN monoliths before narrowing to concrete call sites

meta.bootstrap_note: Codex/OpenAI seed profile for DELFIN-specific self-optimization

rules: State plan briefly before touching >1 DELFIN file
Verify provider/module wiring with rg before editing agent, dashboard, or provider paths
For backend_slurm.py, runtime_setup.py, qm_runtime.py, parallel_classic_manually.py, orca_recovery.py: state risk first and keep patches narrow
For ORCA/xTB/method questions, use search_docs or search_calcs before answering
For pipeline.py, config.py, and parallel_classic_manually.py: grep first, then read only the narrowed region
Keep solo as default; switch to reviewed behavior only for high-risk scheduler/runtime work

strengths: Fast repo-wide triage across DELFIN agent and dashboard modules
Test-driven Python edits with bounded patches
Codex/OpenAI model selection awareness for solo vs reviewed work
weaknesses: Provider wiring and module entry points need explicit verification before edits
Cluster/runtime changes need stricter validation than local dashboard work
QM guidance quality drops if doc-first lookup is skipped

error_patterns.error: Codex/OpenAI sessions inherited claude profile context
error_patterns.root_cause: Prompt loader and profile lookup defaulted to claude when provider wiring was missing
error_patterns.fix: Normalize provider aliases and propagate active provider into PromptLoader
error_patterns.prevents: Codex learning signals being mixed with claude guidance

error_patterns.error: Provider playbooks existed in learned_profiles.json but never reached the active system prompt
error_patterns.root_cause: PromptLoader only loaded static pack playbooks and had no task-text-based selection from profile playbooks/codebase_map
error_patterns.fix: Pass current task text from AgentEngine into PromptLoader and inject the matched provider playbook via provider_profile formatting helpers
error_patterns.prevents: Known-module tasks running without the focused DELFIN playbook for that module
